name: hc-idv-booking
description: Identity verification anchor: resolves the customer using any one of booking/group reference, phone, or DOB (dd/mm/yyyy) when unique; returns clientId, plan context, and bookings for the requested week.

phone.description: Optional when bookingReference or dob uniquely identifies the customer. Aliases: Phone, Mobile, phoneNumber, CallerPhone, ANI

dob.description: Date of birth dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd (optional). Aliases: Dob, DOB, dateOfBirth, birthDate

bookingReference.description: Any BK### booking id or GRP### group id. Aliases: BookingReference, bookingId, BookingId, bookingRef, bookingNumber, reference, groupId, bookingGroupId

weekStart.description: Monday date for the roster week: dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd (optional). Aliases: WeekStart, rosterWeekStart

referenceDate.description: Any date inside the week when weekStart is omitted. Aliases: ReferenceDate, asAtDate, weekReferenceDate
